policy: Prove remaining version-name checklist surfaces are covered by deterministic inventories, removal queues, legitimate-version allowlists, or explicit manual boundaries. Checklist docs are not configuration.

boundaries: Do not remove compatibility-sensitive legacy names in the same change that creates an alias.
Provider dashboards, scheduled jobs, external analytics, and production SQL objects require manual cutover evidence.
